title: Conduct operational inspection of park facilities
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct operational inspection of park facilities demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for operational inspection

pcs.text: Determine from operational request, specific facilities and equipment to be inspected and purpose of inspection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine from operational request, specific facilities and equipment to be inspected and purpose of inspection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine from operational request, specific facilities and equipment to be inspected and purpose of inspection.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks of conducting inspection, and implement safe working practices to address risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential hazards and risks of conducting inspection, and implement safe working practices to address risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks of conducting inspection, and implement safe working practices to address risks.

pcs.text: Select, tools and equipment required for testing and inspection and check for safe operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, tools and equipment required for testing and inspection and check for safe operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, tools and equipment required for testing and inspection and check for safe operation.

pcs.text: Prepare checklists and reporting formats applicable to inspection purpose
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare checklists and reporting formats applicable to inspection purpose?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare checklists and reporting formats applicable to inspection purpose.

pcs.text: Identify the different types of facilities from checklist descriptions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the different types of facilities from checklist descriptions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the different types of facilities from checklist descriptions.

pcs.text: Clarify specific terminology used in checklists with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clarify specific terminology used in checklists with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clarify specific terminology used in checklists with supervisor.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for operational inspection

elements.title: Undertake operational inspection

pcs.text: Identify and record non-conformity with Australian standards and workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record non-conformity with Australian standards and workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record non-conformity with Australian standards and workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Identify and record damaged or unserviceable infrastructure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record damaged or unserviceable infrastructure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record damaged or unserviceable infrastructure.

pcs.text: Identify and record site hazards and indications or signs of hidden faults
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record site hazards and indications or signs of hidden faults?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record site hazards and indications or signs of hidden faults.

pcs.text: Maintain accurate and concise checklist entries and photographic records according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain accurate and concise checklist entries and photographic records according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain accurate and concise checklist entries and photographic records according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Undertake operational inspection

elements.title: Finalise the park inspection

pcs.text: Report and record areas or situations requiring urgent action or closure of facilities to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report and record areas or situations requiring urgent action or closure of facilities to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report and record areas or situations requiring urgent action or closure of facilities to supervisor.

pcs.text: Secure or isolate areas requiring urgent action
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Secure or isolate areas requiring urgent action?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Secure or isolate areas requiring urgent action.

pcs.text: Record recommendations to rectify non-conformities as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record recommendations to rectify non-conformities as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record recommendations to rectify non-conformities as required.

pcs.text: Complete inspection report, including photographs where required and submit to client or supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete inspection report, including photographs where required and submit to client or supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete inspection report, including photographs where required and submit to client or supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Finalise the park inspection

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
